steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is the singular noun phrase Food writer J. Kenji López-Alt. The descriptive clause about exploring cooking science does not change the number of that subject, so the blank needs a singular present-tense verb.

steps.title: Reject nonmatching verbs
steps.content: Choice A is plural present tense. Choice C is plural present perfect. Choice D is plural progressive. Each fails to agree with the singular subject. The answer is B.
